name: AI-Powered DevOps
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for incident root-cause analysis, runbook generation, change-risk scoring, and auto-remediation plan synthesis

prod.note: ~2M tokens/day, real-time incident triage at scale

enterprise.note: Provisioned throughput for sub-second incident correlation

services.name: Azure Monitor
services.purpose: Centralized telemetry ingestion — metrics, logs, alerts, and diagnostic data from all monitored resources

services.name: Azure DevOps
services.purpose: Pipeline orchestration, work item management, artifact repository, AI-generated release notes and change approval

services.name: Azure Functions
services.purpose: Event-driven incident handlers — alert ingestion, AI triage dispatch, remediation execution, notification routing

services.name: Azure Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Incident knowledge base — past incidents, root causes, remediation playbooks, correlation patterns

services.name: Log Analytics
services.purpose: Centralized log store for KQL-based incident correlation, AI-driven anomaly detection, and audit trail

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: OpenAI API keys, DevOps PATs, webhook secrets, remediation service credentials

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: AIOps pipeline performance — incident detection latency, AI triage accuracy, remediation success rates

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for low-severity alert classification and runbook lookups — reserve GPT-4o for complex root-cause analysis across correlated incidents
Cache incident correlation patterns in Cosmos DB — identical alert fingerprints skip AI analysis and return known root causes instantly
Implement alert deduplication and grouping before AI triage — reduces token consumption by 60-80% during incident storms
Use Log Analytics Basic tier for high-volume diagnostic logs that rarely need querying — saves 50% vs Analytics tier
Schedule non-urgent AI analyses (trend reports, postmortem generation) during off-peak hours on Consumption Functions
Configure Azure Monitor alert suppression rules to avoid duplicate AI triage calls for known maintenance windows
